summary: Complete testing of Eleitora 360 - Electoral Financial Management System. All requested features tested successfully: Candidato login, TSE spending limits, Contador Portal, Contracts with required attachments, and Despesas with receipt upload functionality.

issues: Non-blocking console warnings about chart dimensions during initial render (Recharts library issue - charts render correctly after page load)
Minor HTML nesting warning: p element containing div (Badge component nested inside p) - cosmetic only, does not affect functionality

passed_tests: Backend: Health check endpoint returns healthy
Backend: Candidato login (admin@test.com/test123) - 200 OK
Backend: Invalid credentials returns 401
Backend: Contador admin login (diretoria@ativacontabilidade.cnt.br/ativa2024) - 200 OK with is_admin=true
Backend: Contador invalid password returns 401
Backend: Contador non-existent email returns 401
Backend: TSE campaign-status requires authentication (401 without token)
Backend: TSE campaign-status returns spending limit data with auth
Backend: TSE limite-gastos calculation endpoint works
Backend: Admin contador can view all campaigns
Backend: Admin contador can view all professionals
Backend: Contracts list returns data
Backend: Contract templates endpoint returns 5 template types
Backend: Required attachments endpoint returns correct data for veiculo_com_motorista
Backend: Expenses list returns data with payment_status field
Backend: Receipt upload endpoint exists and validates file requirement
Frontend: Login page loads correctly with form elements
Frontend: Candidato login redirects to dashboard with success toast
Frontend: Dashboard shows TSE Limit card with correct data (Limite: R$50k, Gasto: R$5k, Disponível: R$45k, 10%)
Frontend: Contador Portal login page loads with data-testid attributes
Frontend: Contador admin login successful - dashboard shows 7 campaigns
Frontend: Contador dashboard shows aggregated stats (Total Receitas: R$105k, Despesas: R$87k, Saldo: R$17k)
Frontend: Contador admin buttons visible (Convidar Profissional, Atribuir Campanhas)
Frontend: Contratos page loads with summary cards and table
Frontend: Required Attachments modal opens correctly for contract with template
Frontend: Modal shows correct required documents for veiculo_com_motorista (CRLV, RG/CPF, CNH, Comprovante Residência)
Frontend: Modal shows file format note (JPEG, PNG, PDF max 10MB)
Frontend: Despesas page shows expense with Pendente status
Frontend: Upload receipt button visible for pending expenses
Frontend: Date filters present on Despesas page
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features tested and working: 1) Candidato login works with admin@test.com/test123, 2) TSE Limit card displays correctly on dashboard showing spending limit, total spent, available balance, and percentage used, 3) Contador Portal accessible at /contador/login with admin account diretoria@ativacontabilidade.cnt.br/ativa2024, 4) Admin contador can view 7 campaigns with aggregated financial stats, 5) Contracts page shows required attachments modal for contracts with template_type, 6) For veiculo_com_motorista type: requires CRLV, RG/CPF, CNH, Comprovante Residência, 7) Despesas page shows receipt upload button for pending expenses, 8) File validation accepts JPEG/PNG/PDF up to 10MB

features_verified.candidato_login: Working - POST /api/auth/login returns token and user data
features_verified.tse_limit_dashboard: Working - Card shows Limite TSE, Total Gasto, Disponível, Utilizado percentage
features_verified.contador_portal_login: Working - POST /api/admin/contador/login returns token, professional data, is_admin flag
features_verified.contador_dashboard: Working - Shows campaign count, total revenues/expenses/balance, professionals list
features_verified.contracts_page: Working - Lists contracts with template type, value, status
features_verified.required_attachments_modal: Working - Shows required documents based on contract type
features_verified.required_attachments_api: Working - GET /api/contracts/{id}/required-attachments returns attachment list with status
features_verified.despesas_page: Working - Shows expenses with payment status (Pago/Pendente)
features_verified.receipt_upload_button: Working - Upload button visible for pending expenses
features_verified.file_validation: Working - Accepts JPEG, PNG, PDF files up to 10MB

imovel: Comprovante de Residência do Locador - required

mocked_apis.pix_banco_brasil: PIX Banco do Brasil integration - MOCKED (only structure implemented)
